name: glad-labs-cofounder-agent
description: AI Co-Founder System - FastAPI backend with autonomous agents, multi-provider LLM routing, and comprehensive error handling (Phase 1C complete).
author: Matthew M. Gladding (Glad Labs, LLC)

scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint:strict && npm run typecheck
scripts.db:reset: python -m alembic downgrade base && python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.env:check: python -c "import os; url = os.getenv('DATABASE_URL'); print(f'DATABASE_URL: {url or \"NOT SET\"}')"
scripts.clean: python -c "import pathlib, shutil; dirs = [p for pattern in ['**/__pycache__', '**/.pytest_cache', '**/.mypy_cache'] for p in pathlib.Path('.').glob(pattern)]; [shutil.rmtree(d, ignore_errors=True) for d in dirs]; pathlib.Path('.coverage').unlink(missing_ok=True); shutil.rmtree('htmlcov', ignore_errors=True); print('✓ Cleaned cache and build files')"
scripts.build: echo 'FastAPI apps run directly (no compilation needed). Run \"npm run validate\" to check code quality.'
